hero.subtitle: NexusAI reads real-time behavioral signals to craft an editorial shopping experience — unique to every visitor, every session.

features.title: Commerce that <1>understands</1> you.
features.subtitle: Four pillars of intelligence working together to create an experience that feels less like shopping, more like discovery.
features.trackingDesc: Every scroll, hover, and click builds a living profile of intent — no surveys, no guessing.
features.personalizationDesc: Product feeds, pricing, and recommendations adapt to your mood within the same session.
features.predictiveDesc: AI anticipates what you need before you search. Surfacing the right product at the right moment.
features.checkoutDesc: One-tap purchase flow with AI-optimized cart suggestions and dynamic pricing strategies.

testimonials.title: Trusted by <1>visionaries</1>.
testimonials.quote1: NexusAI understood my style before I did. The recommendations feel eerily accurate — in the best way.
testimonials.quote2: We switched from a generic Shopify setup. 34% lift in conversion within the first month. No going back.
testimonials.quote3: The behavioral engine surfaces products I didn't know I wanted. It's less shopping, more curating.

cta.title: Start your <1>intelligent</1> commerce journey.
cta.subtitle: Join the next wave of brands using behavioral intelligence to create shopping experiences that feel alive.

products.catalogDescription: Each product is curated through our behavioral intelligence engine, surfacing what matters most to you.
products.noProductsHint: Try adjusting your filters or browse our full collection.

footer.brand: Behavioral Commerce Intelligence. Powered by real-time AI personalization that learns from every interaction.
